asset_name: Reward Card Pick Panel — post-victory reveal, hover, and selection states
shared_properties: The reward panel reuses academy gold trim and deep navy panels to stay consistent with the battle HUD.
Three-card choice layout must remain readable over a dimmed battle scene without fully replacing the stage.
Hover and selected states need clear focus framing for mouse-first interaction.
differences: This task covers the post-victory reward selection overlay rather than the active combat hand.
Core card-face artwork stays in the battle card sheet.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Moodboard for elegant magical reward presentation that still feels like the academy duel interface.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_player_silhouette
reference_images.purpose: Player silhouette board for dimmed-scene layering so the overlay keeps the battle context visible behind it.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/reflect_academy/trial_2/ui_reward_card_pick_panel.png during DuelLoading and cache the atlas under ui_reward_card_pick_panel.
runtime_notes: Use four states named closed, reveal_choices, hovered_choice, and selected_choice.
Show the panel on the overlay camera with a dimmed world underlay and keep the three card slots aligned to center screen.
Runtime text can inject reward labels and rarity names inside the framed slot headers.

context.usage: Post-battle overlay that presents three reward cards and confirms the player choice before the next duel.

layout_notes: Panel centers three reward slots with 60px gaps and a headline plaque above them.
Closed state contains only the decorative frame and dim underlay mask.
Hovered and selected states add focus glows around one of the three slots without moving the base panel.

shape.silhouette: Large center-screen plaque with three framed card bays, headline crest, and footer confirm area.

acceptance_criteria: State sheet is exactly 5280x760px with four 1320x760 states and no padding.
Three reward bays remain centered and evenly spaced in reveal, hover, and selected states.
Hover and selected focus treatments are visually distinct without changing the underlying panel geometry.
The overlay still allows the dimmed academy stage to remain recognizable in the background.
